text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see Hishi Amazon! She's been on
the up and up ever since she became a senior
racer!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I know what you mean! I'm here just to see her
race!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I hope Narita Brian does well. I really want to see
those two running neck-and-neck with each other!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless fans watch from the stands, eagerly
anticipating Hishi Amazon's arrival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the Japan Cup! Every racer I've
seen looks tough as nails!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, don't you worry about me, Teach. The
adrenaline is just kickin' in.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
More importantly... I've got somethin' to do
today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...I wanna show Brian something. See, I was
thinkin' about what she said up on the rooftop.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
From the sounds of it, there's someone she's
looking to outdo, and she's been trying to catch
up to 'em ever since.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't know the details. She might still be at it, or
maybe she's already over and done with it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But if a rival's what motivates her to run...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I want it to be me—the target she's trying to catch
up to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then it clicks. I remember something she let
slip before...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm startin' to see what I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And in order to see that through, I've gotta aim
high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've finally realized why she trains with so much
vigor.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure if I can pull it off, but...
choice_data_list:
You never know how a race will turn out till you
run it, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yeah, exactly!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm on fire today! Come an' get it, Narita Brian!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup, a G1 race where only the
strongest competition gather, is beginning at last!
